args.CodeContent:
import json

transcript_path = r"C:\Users\Ishan\.gemini\antigravity-ide\brain\5b29bd2f-6951-4615-bb58-4a2d3cb88d31\.system_generated\logs\transcript_full.jsonl"

found = []

with open(transcript_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    for line in f:
        try:
            data = json.loads(line)
            # Find entries that represent tool outputs from viewing test-execution/page.tsx
            # Or model planner responses with replace_file_content targetFile
            content_str = json.dumps(data)
            if "test-execution/page.tsx" in content_str or "test-execution\\page.tsx" in content_str:
                if "Total Lines: 694" in content_str or "Total Lines: 735" in content_str:
                    found.append(data)
        except Exception as e:
            pass

print(f"Found {len(found)} entries.")
if found:
    # Save the latest one
    latest = found[-1]
    with open("retrieved_te_output.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as out:
        json.dump(latest, out, indent=2)
    print("Saved to retrieved_te_output.json")
args.Description: Write script to find the viewed content of test-execution page in transcript_full.jsonl
